name: rate-limit-watcher
description: Watches the 5h rate limit window for upgrade transitions (green→yellow→red→critical) and emits a periodic health pulse every 30min. On EVERY notification (ZONE_UPGRADE or HEALTHY), IMMEDIATELY invoke the /session-guardian:react skill with the args provided in the ACTION line. Args format: "<zone> <pct> <mins_left>". Do not ignore notifications — the reactor decides whether to alert the user, send messages to active subagents, or trigger the HARD STOP pause sequence (≥90%).
